productDisplayName: Fila Men Striper Pique White Tshirt
description: Composition White polo neck T-shirt with red and black stripes, made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has short sleeves, ribbed neck and cuffs, short buttoned placket, vented hem, embroidered brand name on the left chest and brand badge on the left hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Update your sophisticated style with this polo neck T-shirt from fila. The badge on the left hem adds a sense of brand factor to this T-shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with jeans or cargos and sneakers Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
